\tzpentry{ID4406}{Stress-Energy Tensor}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4406 introduces Stress-Energy Tensor as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} T^{\mu\nu}_{\mathrm{total}} = T^{\mu\nu}_{\mathrm{vacuum}} + T^{\mu\nu}_{\mathrm{matter}} + T^{\mu\nu}_{\mathrm{grav}}, \end{equation}
